MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald E Quidachay; Clerk: K. Liu ; Not Reported. (D501)
Appearances:
Plaintiff M. Angstenberger S. Angstenberger are present.
Defendant Annica Carlin is present.
Attorney Shannon Fagan representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Elan Lambert, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 504B, for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed. The trial date of Dec 31-012 is vacated. (501/JPT)
